# Ignore missing/unresolved platform APIs in version 253 (any plugin version)
Dart::.*ReadAction\.computeBlocking.*
Dart::.*runReadActionBlocking.*
Dart::.*FormattingService\.canFormat.*
Dart::.*CodeVisionProvider\.handleExtraAction.*

# Ignore missing resource bundles / property messages
Dart::.*LspBundle.*
Dart::.*lsp.*
